problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: fMRI connectivity study with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
